query_intent: Compute January 2002 sales for Home-category manufacturers at GMT offset -5 across store, catalog, and web channels, then combine channels to rank manufacturers by total sales.

dag_nodes.intent: Aggregate January 2002 store sales by manufacturer for Home-category items sold to addresses at GMT offset -5.
Aggregate January 2002 catalog sales by manufacturer for Home-category items billed to addresses at GMT offset -5.
Aggregate January 2002 web sales by manufacturer for Home-category items billed to addresses at GMT offset -5.
Union manufacturer totals from all three channels and sum to a cross-channel total sales figure per manufacturer.
